weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 21 total findings, with 6 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-33017, CVE-2026-23282, CVE-2026-3608, CVE-2025-54068, CVE-2025-43520, and CVE-2025-32432, each observed only once. The threats were dispersed across multiple security domains, including AI and ML threats, containers and Kubernetes, crypto libraries, operating system and kernel vulnerabilities, npm and Node, PyPI and Python, as well as web and server exposures. Notably, the most active day was March 26, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security incidents that warrant continued monitoring and analysis.
